Okay, so we're going to be doing a few different awards this year. First of which is we're going to be doing, okay, all right, here's the presentation. So how was the first day? Good? Okay, awesome. So what's really cool about this is we've done this dinner now four times. And at each time, I just like to mark the growth that's happened on our side. In Albuquerque, in August 2017, we had five employees. That was our little picture. Some of you OGs were there. I appreciate you. At our second one, we had 18 employees in Albuquerque, which you also remember, that was a little bit bigger. We got a real hotel that time. They'd never done a big event. They ran out of food. They ran out of water. They didn't have an AV team. It was fantastic. The third one was here, the JW, and they absolutely crushed it. Went from 18 to 48 employees. And here we are now, January a year later, or sorry, six months later, with 88 full-time team to support this awesome community. So thank you. And so I always love showing what we've, you know, like where we've been and like how much we've accomplished as a group. And it's good for my mental health, since I probably just like you only think about what we can improve and not what we've actually achieved. So in the last year, we've learned a lot about the gym business overall and the service business because we've been, I mean, we're essentially in the same business, just done differently. And we've learned so much from you guys as a community. So I can only tell you when you guys are like, oh, Alex, so innovative. I'm like, I'm just learning from you guys. And so that's why this is such an awesome community for you guys, because like we have the same data source. I'm learning just as much, like you can learn from you as much as I learned from you. Which made me wonder, like, why is this group so much more innovative than groups that I've been a part of in the past? And I've been a part of a lot of them. And I think it's because this is the only community that I'm aware of that doesn't say take the easy route and outsource it. But instead, we as a community have come together and said, like, we're going to learn, we're going to become better, we're going to increase our skill set, we are going to become more valuable. We're going to treat everyone in our world as special. Like that's what we are choosing to do. And that was a decision on our part. And once a group of entrepreneurs with similar challenges that comes together with the skills, I don't think there's a lot that can stop us. Because every other group, collective, et cetera, never had the skills. Like they never learned how to use APR. They never learned how to run their own ads. They never learned because someone wanted to hold that information hostage so that they could just continue to get paid on it. But you all have everything. We don't hold anything back. And that's really scary from being on the top because you could make the argument, why would they need us? Why would they keep paying us? But on the flip side, it creates a community that no one can compete with because of the level of innovation that happens internally because you can innovate and execute at the same level that we can. Which is awesome. And I think that's why this is so cool. Isn't that awesome? Woo! Okay. And yeah, it's because you guys don't need us. So this was a super scary strategic decision for us because we were like, what about the legacy stuff? This was before we did legacy. Do I want to give away my high ticket thing? That's like, we made so much money on that. I don't know if I want to just give that away. But it was the best decision we ever made. And that's why we'll always be teaching people to fish instead of fishing for them. So like I said, if the goal is freedom, which is our 100% goal for every gym owner in this room, is absolute freedom in every sense, I could not make that promise to you. And then in the same breath say, but you need to pay us for all these critical business functions. Like how can you tell someone that? And so I want to thank you for making this all possible and functioning like within this ecosystem that we have. All of this is because of you guys. Thank you. So I talk a lot about abundant exchange, which is everyone here has heard me talk about abundant exchange where you give more. Everyone here is in abundant exchange with one another. So you guys give more than you kind of ask. And so as a community, we continue to pile on gifts onto each other, which I think is like the coolest thing ever. And it's one of the things that makes this so special. And that's why we do and will continue to fiercely, fiercely protect it in terms of the membership of who we include, who we allow to stay in, who we allow to be associated with the community. Everything that we do is to protect that because it's everything. So thank you for helping us protect it and for helping one another without worry of scarcity. I can't tell you, you hear so many of the like gym stories of people flying out to other people's gyms to like check out their sales process or the retention process or how they're organizing their floor plan or whatever, right? And that's awesome because I know that there's been other communities that I've been a part of where guys are doing like trying to figure out side deals and stuff like, come on. You know what I mean? And it's just like everyone just giving with open hands and everyone's better off for it. So thank you. So I didn't want to do a traditional transformation challenge mostly because like it's, oh right, you lost the most weight. Hurray! Like I know that all of you guys know how to get your craft together for a few months at a time. So I wanted to make this multifaceted in that I wanted to make sure that the people who got awarded were transformed as people. And so like nutrition and accountability and fitness are definitely part of those things. But I want to give you a list of the criteria that I used to make an objective scoring system. So the first category was improving your body, the obvious one. So there's a total change in body weight. But to help even the playing field, there's also the total change in percent body weight, which gets women in there a little bit too. And then lastly, the subjective form of that was the total change in look. So if you made a massive visual difference that also counted towards the score. And then after improve your body, there was a sharp in your mind. And that is, did you adhere to a plan that you had made? Did you keep good records? Did you report in and have good feedback to the support that you had? Was there an open line of communication you had with your support system? And was there an eagerness to learn and apply your information? And lastly, there is inspire your community, which is basically be as obnoxious as possible in the group and try and give back as much as you can and inspiring others to try and transform as well. So all of these things were included. And there was a very fancy scoring system that was used. So I'm super proud of everybody.
